_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Author, maintain, and enforce the enterprise data policy library, ensuring policies are current, accessible, enforced, and aligned with regulatory requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.517), RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.416). Shared vocabulary: [policy]. DCWF-only terms [input, operational, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, aligned, author, current, data, enforce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.885, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Provide input to operational policy." and "Author, maintain, and enforce the enterprise data policy library, ensuring polic" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 > STS 0.416 (gap +0.115). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [policy] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [policy]. DCWF-only: [input, operational, provide]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, aligned, author, current, data, enforce].
